examples: Bits of tulle and fuzzy yarn hang mistily from the rafters.
A black tulle dress comes with a wide grosgrain band that ACTS as a neck accent or belt.
Slippers crowned with tulle pom-poms will satisfy the longings of future prima-ballerinas.
Amy Adams wore a big ball gown with raw edge tulle from Oscar de la Renta.
Mathieu Mirano's fall presentation was pelt-heavy, including a nude tulle gown with black fox fur panels.
